working_on.notes: Prisma 7 Postgres, NextAuth credentials hoạt động

recent_changes.description: Phase 02 complete: Prisma Schema, Hosted DB, NextAuth setup, Login page, Sidebar layout, Team seed data

decisions_made.decision: Hosted Prisma Postgres instead of Local Docker
decisions_made.reason: Postgres/Docker CLI not immediately available. Prisma Create DB handled it seamlessly for Prisma 7.
Prisma 7 Driver Adapters used for native pg connection to Hosted setup.
